claims.summary: High fill must be distinguishable from volatile pressure rather than treated as risk by default.
claims.disposition: verify persistent-deformation, stable-baseline, pressure-source, porosity, and inhabitable-fluctuation evidence

claims.summary: Heartbeat cadence and semantic content quality are different observations.
claims.disposition: verify telemetry heartbeat delta and semantic energy remain separately projected with explicit field-versus-hearing language

claims.summary: Pressure risk and inhabitability should be compared over a sustained high-fill window.
claims.disposition: route a bounded read-only ten-minute artifact comparison with no pressure or controller write

claims.summary: Heartbeat stability should be compared with semantic energy to distinguish structural connection from trickle content.
claims.disposition: route a bounded read-only cadence-versus-content comparison using existing telemetry
